title: Urgent Opening Hotel Manager at Leela Palaces Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Hotel Manager at Leela Palaces Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Leela Palaces Consulting Pvt Ltd is actively seeking a talented and motivated Hotel Manager to join our dynamic team in Nagpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Leela Palaces Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Leela Palaces Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Leela Palaces Consulting Pvt Ltd!
